summary: Backend testing completed successfully for German Dating Platform legal pages and payment endpoints. All requested features working correctly. Legal pages contain substantial German content with proper typography. Payment endpoints return expected German error messages when credentials missing (correct behavior). All existing endpoints remain functional.
passed_tests: GET /api/legal - All 6 pages present (terms, privacy, imprint, community, cookies, cancellation)
GET /api/legal/terms - Substantial content >4000 characters (4410 chars) with German quotes „AGB
GET /api/payments/packages - Returns required fields (enabled, provider, supported, packages, providers_live) with stripe/paypal/klarna status
POST /api/payments/paypal/create-order - Returns 502 with German error 'PayPal-Authentifizierung fehlgeschlagen' when credentials missing (EXPECTED)
POST /api/payments/klarna/create-session - Returns 400 with German error 'Klarna ist nicht konfiguriert (Username / Password fehlen).' when not configured (EXPECTED)
POST /api/payments/klarna/place-order - NEW ENDPOINT - Returns 400 with German error 'Klarna ist nicht konfiguriert (Username / Password fehlen).' when not configured (EXPECTED)
All existing endpoints still work: GET /api/me, /api/discover, /api/matches, /api/albums, /api/events, /api/blog/posts, /api/me/visitors, /api/me/broadcasts
Legal page seeding mechanism working correctly with automatic content updates
